# Transcrição: When_You_Change_Your_Voice..._You_Change_Your_Personality.

- **Fonte:** When_You_Change_Your_Voice..._You_Change_Your_Personality.

- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:28]

Here is the most powerful lesson I learned from my vocal coach. Here it is. Your voice is your personality. What a statement. I remember when I first heard this I was like, say what? That doesn't make sense. But I mean let's think about it for a moment. How do you think people form judgments about you and your personality? People often think it's just about the content of the communication. However, it's often all in the subtle things you do with your body language, like how you shed your hand, how you move your facial expressions, and how you use your voice. Usually with all of this information combined, people then start to form assumptions and form beliefs about you and your personality. And I can tell you right now that the thing that people neglect the most is how they use their voice. Remember what my vocal coach said. Your voice is your personality. This was a massive unlock for me. Let's do a quick experiment right now and you be the judge, okay? How would you judge my personality in these two different examples I'm about to share? This is example one. Hi, how are you? I've seen you looking around the store for a while now. Is there anything I can help you with? Hi, how are you? I've seen you looking around the store for a while now. Is there anything I can help you with? Okay, I mean I know that's a little bit obvious, right? But did you notice the difference? Yes, you're correct. My body language plays a part. But did you also notice how my voice plays a crucial part in how you perceived my personality in those two different examples? People are often unaware that their voice has an image. It's too easy to focus just on what we wear, the watch, the hair, the pants, etc. But because when it comes to your voice, the vocal image is invisible, people pay no attention to it, people don't work on it, and they don't realize that by missing out on the vocal image, you're missing out on 50% of the puzzle when it comes to your personality. I've got a question for you. What does your vocal image say about your personality? Are you aware of this? If you're new to my content and you've never joined me for one of my free master classes, then come join me this February. If you're interested in communication skills, I'm putting on two exclusive sessions where you can join me for two full hours where it's you, me, and our class live. To save your spot in my master class, check out the comment section. My team will drop a link there so you're able to register. If you want to join, make sure you book your place in, spots are limited. Looking forward to seeing you in February as we kick off 2024 together.
